title: 殿下、推し文化に触れる

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion and I are on our way back from a day
out. At her insistence, we stop by an Umamusume
store.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Wow! There are plushies with our faces on them!
And folders! And key chains!
choice_data_list: Are you looking for anything in particular?
Are you looking for anything in particular?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Actually, I think I'm here less to shop than
to study. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I wish to learn all about the concept of "oshi"!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
F-F-F-FINE?! What is a beautiful, noble
Umamusume like you doing in a place like this?!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I've come to study up on these "oshis"
you always talk about so cheerfully. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
If you buy someone's merchandise, does that
make them your oshi? Shall I buy some of your
merchandise, Digital?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
GUH-HUH?! I could never hope to be worthy
enough!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: B-besides! You've got the order backwards! First you decide on your oshi and then you buy her merch!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And you don't stop at simply buying merch! You
must stan your oshi twenty-four-seven! Material
purchases are but one way to show your undying
love!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
When you buy merch, you're declaring your deep
adoration for your oshi... In short, the merch
heightens your devotion!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I see, I see! You really are the very best person to
ask concerning all things oshi. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Please, Digital, tell me more, I implore you! I have
so much to learn!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Waaah?! I'm not worthy! Th-th-th-the mere
p-p-prospect of sp-speaking with someone like
you on the topic of oshis is—

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: But I wish to learn from you! Please!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
M-my oshi's wish is my command! It's my job as a
stan to do whatever I can for you!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I, the lowly Agnes Digital, will guide you firsthand
down the path of the oshi as I know it!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Now then, you two! Do you have a good grip on
your light sticks?!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Yes!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hi, everyone! Thanks for coming out today!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
We're just getting started up here, so don't take
your eyes off the stage!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Now, allow us to give you... a performance as
dazzling as the view from first place.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Right. Initiating street performance protocol.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
HNGAAAH! SIMPLY SUBLIME! Can you see it?!
They're not just bringing us joy—THEY ARE
GIVING US LIFE!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I can, I can! They're all sparkling so brightly!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: If you can see it, respond to it! Let your heart take control of your light stick and wave it proudly! That is what it means to stan!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Whooooaaaa! Umapyoi! Umapyoi!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Umapyoi! Umapyoi! Do your best! Umapyoooi! ♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah.. ULTIMATE PLEASURE!
choice_data_list: So, think you've learned more about oshis now?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Absolutely! ♪ Your oshis are your favorites—the
people you wish to cheer on the most!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Incredible! That's my Uma queen for you! Your
majestic eyes really do penetrate to the heart of
things!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
An oshi is the spring whose water cleanses your
heart! The fountainhead from which flows the
lifeforce of tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Witness their hard work and let yourself be
moved! Embrace the energy their radiant forms
emit! They'll give you the means to overcome the
hardships of daily life!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Yes, yes! Oshis really are grand, aren't they?
choice_data_list: You're somebody's oshi too, you know.
Do you have an oshi, Fine?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for those kind words! I sure hope
you're right.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
But instead of "someone"... I wonder if you'd do
me the honor of letting me be your oshi, Trainer.
choice_data_list: I've stanned you since the moment we met.
I've stanned you since the moment we met.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I see! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Well then, as your oshi, I'll have to be even cooler
from now on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, Agnes Digital insists she could never
impose upon such a "precious pair," so Fine
Motion and I head back by ourselves.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Well, let's see... Digital is cute. Shakur is cool.
And Groove is lovely too!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
But you know, there's someone who gives me
even more energy than they do. Someone who
works hard right by my side.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Any ideas who that might be, Trainer? ♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
HNNNGH OMG, a sneak attack right to the
heart! I CAN'T!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Distracted helping Agnes Digital up after her
sudden fall, I end up missing out on learning the
identity of Fine Motion's oshi.
